data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for automatic bid extension.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Automatic bid extension if bid in final hour (prevent sniping)', but there is no concrete API read or persisted state check provided in the evidence to confirm this requirement was satisfied. The linked use case describes a scenario where bids are placed, but it does not provide specific evidence of the bid extension functionality being triggered or validated. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the automatic bid extension functionality was triggered during the auction.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic check for bid extension
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Implement explicit endpoint + assertion contract to verify the automatic bid extension functionality.
